title: LAPAROSCOPIC METHOD OF TREATMENT OF SIMULTANEOUS DISEASES OF THE ABDOMINAL AND PELVIC CAVITIES WITH EXTRACTION OF THE ORGAN USING THE NOSE METHOD
author: Shavazi R.N
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: To evaluate the immediate and long-term results of surgical treatment of patients with simultaneous diseases of the abdominal and pelvic organs after laparoscopic right hemicolectomy with the specimen extraction transvaginelly according to the natural orifice organs specimen extraction (NOSE) method.
steps_raw: To evaluate the immediate and long-term results of surgical treatment of patients with simultaneous diseases of the abdominal and pelvic organs after laparoscopic right hemicolectomy with the specimen extraction transvaginelly according to the natural orifice organs specimen extraction (NOSE) method.
